hooks.command: $raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); try { $d = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = $d.tool_input.file_path } catch { $fp = '' }; if ($fp -and $fp -match '\.py$') { [PSCustomObject]@{hookSpecificOutput=[PSCustomObject]@{hookEventName='PostToolUse';additionalContext='[CLAUDE.md check] .py file modified. Review CLAUDE.md and update if class names, function signatures, run commands, architecture, or data paths have changed.'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }
